_publications._publicationTitle: Anti-cancer agent 3-bromopyruvate reduces growth of MPNST and inhibits metabolic pathways in a representative in-vitro model.

_contextSnippet: MPNST showed a moderate to high labelling for Ki67 (highest in S462 with nearly 100%)
details: Successfully detected moderate to high Ki67 labeling in MPNST cells, with highest expression in S462 at nearly 100%
